data.description:
## Summary
The store's `git commit` path (`_git_commit`, `_git_commit_paths`, and the UU-recovery commit
in `src/rebar/_store/event_append.py`) lacked the object-DB transient retry that `_git_add`
has. A `git commit` WRITES new tree + commit loose objects via git's same `create_tmpfile`
path as `git add`; on a CI-runner FS that intermittently fails ("unable to create temporary
file"). `_git_commit` retried only index.lock + "could not parse HEAD", so this transient
surfaced as a hard StoreError, dropping a concurrent locked `append_event` write.

This is the intermittent failure of
`tests/interfaces/store/test_enrich_drain_prune_concurrency.py::test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes`
(swallowed_write_raises=1, lost=1). ~4% reproduce rate locally; seen on CI ubuntu py3.12.

## Root Cause (proven)
`_git_add` composed an object-DB retry (`_TRANSIENT_ADD_MARKERS` loop); `_git_commit` /
`_git_commit_paths` / UU-recovery commit did not — asymmetric coverage left when the object-DB
add retry was added (edf7/vocal-dip-robin). Proven by injection: injecting the object-DB
signature into the FIRST `git commit` makes `stage_and_commit` RAISE (no retry) and lose the
event; the same signature into `git add` self-heals; index.lock into `git commit` self-heals.

## Fix
Factor the object-DB retry into a shared `_with_transient_add_retry(run_once)` helper and apply
it to `_git_commit`, `_git_commit_paths`, and the UU-recovery commit (and refactor `_git_add`
to use it). Add a live RED test (`test_single_write_retries_transient_commit_odb_failure`) that
injects the object-DB signature on the first commit and asserts self-heal.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `_git_commit`, `_git_commit_paths`, and the UU-recovery commit retry the object-DB
  transient (via `_with_transient_add_retry`). Proof: `pytest tests/interfaces/store/test_event_append_transient_retry.py`.
- [ ] A RED test asserts a commit object-DB transient self-heals; it fails if the retry is
  removed from `_git_commit` (mutation-checked).
- [ ] The concurrency test passes across repeated runs (post-fix failure rate ~0 vs ~4% pre-fix).
- [ ] make lint + typecheck pass; no existing test weakened.
data.title: Store git commit drops a concurrent locked write on an unretried object-DB FS transient (enrich-prune flake)
